column3: Choosing the right pet is a very important decision.
Each and every pet has an interesting and unique personality.
Having two pets can be more enjoyable than having one.
It is necessary to take care of your pet's health if it has problems.
pets need something to play with, just like people do.
Giving an unwanted pet a home is an opportunity to do something kind.
A pet often loves its owner and can be like a best friend.
